raw_consumer_statement: I bought a pair of XXXX sunglasses for the price of XXXX from Macys on XX/XX/2023 and I returned them on XX/XX/2023. I have the return receipt but the refund never posted to my Macys credit card. It has been 11 months since Ive been dealing with this matter. I have spoke to many people in the customer representative department and I have contacted there executive department. I have been told there is no record of my return transaction.
